chapter_title.en: Chapter on Fasting on the Day of Doubt

text: اَلنِّصْفِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنْ صِيَامِهِ فَقَالَ «لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَصُومَ إِلاَّ مَا أَسْلَمَ فِيهِ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَقْضِيَ مَا قَدْ مَضَى مِنْهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1930 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a man who converted to Islam in the middle of the Month of Ramadan: What is required of him in terms of fasting?
Imam (as) said: "He is only required to fast the days remaining from when he became Muslim, and he is not obligated to make up the days that have already passed."
